name: Praline Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, granulated sugar and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, brown sugar and flour. Mix until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in vanilla; stir in chopped pecans.
3. Pour the mixture over the crust. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F., then continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, and cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill. Brush with maple syrup; top with pecan halves.
